title: LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without consent
summary:
LG monitors are reportedly installing unwanted software, including McAfee promotions, via Windows Update without user consent. Gamers Nexus reproduced this with an LG UltraGear 34GX900A-B, observing that Windows Update first installed LG extension packages, followed by the "LG Monitor App Installer" appearing silently within a minute.

The installation occurs without a consent prompt. Gamers Nexus found that the software displayed a McAfee promotion during 31 out of 32 system boots, offering a 30-day trial that converts to a paid subscription. On the remaining boot, it promoted an LG utility. This behavior isn't limited to new monitors, as it also affected a three-year-old LG UltraFine 32UN880-B.

Concerns include the lack of user approval, the persistent McAfee pop-ups, and the application's broad permissions (internet access, all system resources) listed in the Microsoft Store.

This automatic installation method is also used by Dell for its Alienware Command Center software. To block such installations, users can enable "Prevent automatic download of applications associated with device metadata" in Windows Group Policy (Computer Configuration, Administrative Templates, System and Device Installation). However, this setting may also prevent useful legitimate monitor or peripheral software from installing automatically.
chinese_title: LG 显示器未经用户同意通过 Windows 更新静默安装软件
chinese_summary:
据报道，LG 显示器通过 Windows 更新在未经用户同意的情况下安装了不需要的软件，其中包括迈克菲（McAfee）推广内容。Gamers Nexus 使用一台 LG UltraGear 34GX900A-B 显示器重现了这一情况，并观察到 Windows 更新首先安装了 LG 扩展包，随后“LG 显示器应用安装程序”在一分钟内悄然出现。

整个安装过程没有出现任何同意提示。Gamers Nexus 发现，该软件在 32 次系统启动中有 31 次显示了迈克菲的推广内容，提供为期 30 天的试用，到期后将转为付费订阅。在另一次启动中，它则推广了一个 LG 工具程序。这种行为不限于新显示器，因为它也影响了一台使用了三年的 LG UltraFine 32UN880-B。

令人担忧的问题包括缺乏用户批准、持续出现的迈克菲弹窗，以及该应用程序在微软商店中列出的广泛权限（互联网访问、所有系统资源）。

戴尔也将其 Alienware 命令中心软件用于这种自动安装方法。为了阻止此类安装，用户可以在 Windows 组策略（计算机配置、管理模板、系统和设备安装）中启用“阻止自动下载与设备元数据相关的应用程序”设置。然而，此设置也可能会阻止有用且合法的显示器或外设软件自动安装。

title: Regressive JPEGs
summary:
The article "Regressive JPEGs" explores manipulating the progressive JPEG format, which typically displays a low-resolution image first by saving data in multiple "scans" and then progressively adding detail. The author discovered that these scans can be structured to effectively *overwrite* previously rendered image data.

An initial attempt to concatenate multiple full images, filtering out markers, demonstrated this switching behavior, but most decoders stop processing after about nine scans to prevent "zip bomb" like issues. Additionally, high-frequency (AC) scans, designed to refine existing data, caused undesirable "ghosting" effects when used in this manner.

The solution involved creating JPEGs composed solely of "DC-only" scans. Each DC-only scan provides only the lowest frequency component for all color channels (YCbCr), effectively presenting a new, low-resolution (1/16th original) image block by block, without ghosting. This technique allowed around 90 frames to be packed into a single JPEG, creating a rudimentary video.

While a clever demonstration of exploiting JPEG standards, this method lacks practical applications because there's no way to embed timing information; playback speed is entirely dependent on network download rates. However, it enables creative uses like unconventional "rickrolls" or unique interactive partial rendering experiences within a single HTML file without CSS or JavaScript.
chinese_title: 倒退式 JPEG
chinese_summary:
文章《逆向JPEG》探讨了如何操纵渐进式JPEG格式，该格式通常通过将数据保存在多个“扫描”中，先显示低分辨率图像，然后逐步添加细节。作者发现，这些扫描可以被构造，以有效地*覆盖*先前渲染的图像数据。

最初尝试连接多个完整图像并过滤掉标记，展示了这种切换行为，但大多数解码器在大约九次扫描后停止处理，以防止类似“压缩炸弹”的问题。此外，旨在细化现有数据的高频（AC）扫描，以这种方式使用时会导致不希望的“重影”效果。

解决方案是创建仅由“纯DC”扫描组成的JPEG。每个纯DC扫描仅提供所有颜色通道（YCbCr）的最低频率分量，有效地逐块呈现一个新的、低分辨率（原始图像的1/16）图像，而没有重影。该技术使得大约90帧可以被打包到一个JPEG中，从而创建了一个基本的视频。

尽管这是对JPEG标准进行利用的巧妙演示，但该方法缺乏实际应用，因为它无法嵌入时间信息；播放速度完全取决于网络下载速率。然而，它支持创造性的用途，例如非传统形式的“瑞克摇”（rickrolls）或在没有CSS或JavaScript的单个HTML文件中实现独特的交互式局部渲染体验。

title: Kaiser nurses say AI, surveillance are making their jobs and patient care worse
summary:
Kaiser Permanente nurses are raising alarms about how artificial intelligence (AI) and surveillance are negatively impacting their jobs and patient care. Nurses, particularly those in advice and triage call centers, report facing criticism and performance evaluations if their calls exceed 15 minutes, with call length factoring into monthly scores. Kaiser also uses software to predict unproductivity and has tested AI systems to rate empathy and tone of voice.

Nurses describe feeling pressured to cut short complex or emotionally charged calls, such as those with suicidal patients, individuals with chronic illnesses, or those needing interpreters, out of fear of reprimand. This pressure, they say, forces them to prioritize efficiency over providing compassionate, thorough care and can lead to withholding vital advice, potentially putting patients at risk. They feel harassed and that AI tools often misinterpret their work.

The California Nurses Association (CNA) is making AI a central issue in ongoing contract negotiations with Kaiser, having already held strikes and protests against its use. Nurses argue that these surveillance methods, while Kaiser claims they enhance patient outcomes and denies using "average handle time" for performance, undermine their professional judgment and contribute to stress and burnout.

Experts and advocates, including Consumer Watchdog, suggest this pattern reflects Kaiser's historical tendency to prioritize costs over quality of care, linking it to broader trends of algorithmic management that turn workers into "fleshy robots." Nurses emphasize that they are dealing with lives, not just customer service, and that technology should benefit patients, not just increase productivity and cut costs.
chinese_title: 凯撒护士称，人工智能和监控正在损害他们的工作和病患护理。
chinese_summary:
凯撒医疗机构的护士们对人工智能（AI）和监控如何对其工作和患者护理产生负面影响发出了警报。护士们，特别是那些在咨询和分诊呼叫中心的护士，报告称如果她们的通话时长超过15分钟，就会面临批评和绩效评估，通话时长甚至会计入她们的月度评分。凯撒还使用软件来预测低效率，并测试了AI系统来评估护士的同理心和语调。

护士们表示，她们感到有压力要缩短那些复杂或情绪化的通话，例如与有自杀倾向的患者、慢性病患者或需要翻译的患者的通话，原因是对受到斥责的恐惧。她们说，这种压力迫使她们优先考虑效率而非提供富有同情心、周全的护理，并可能导致无法提供关键建议，从而使患者面临风险。她们感到受到骚扰，并且认为AI工具经常误解她们的工作。

加州护士协会（CNA）正在将AI作为与凯撒正在进行的合同谈判中的一个核心议题，此前她们已举行了罢工和抗议活动，反对AI的使用。护士们认为，这些监控方法损害了她们的专业判断，并导致了压力和职业倦怠，尽管凯撒声称它们能提高患者治疗效果，并否认使用“平均处理时间”进行绩效考核。

专家和倡导者，包括“消费者监督”组织，认为这种模式反映了凯撒长期以来优先考虑成本而非护理质量的倾向，并将其与更广泛的算法管理趋势联系起来，这种趋势将员工变成了“血肉机器人”。护士们强调，她们面对的是生命，而不仅仅是客户服务，技术应该造福患者，而不仅仅是提高生产力和削减成本。

title: First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star
summary:
Researchers have made a groundbreaking discovery: the first atmosphere detected on an Earth-like, rocky planet orbiting within the habitable zone of a distant star. This finding, described by Dr. Collin Cherubim of Harvard University as "a big deal," offers the strongest evidence yet that conditions similar to Earth might exist beyond our solar system.

The planet, named LHS 1140 b, is 48 light-years away, orbiting a red star. While the detected atmospheric gas is primarily helium, which cannot sustain life on its own, scientists speculate that other, more life-supporting gases could be present at lower altitudes.

This discovery is a crucial step towards answering the fundamental question of whether life exists elsewhere. Planets in the "Goldilocks zone" – the optimal distance from their star for liquid water to exist – are considered prime candidates for life. Although hundreds of planets have been found in these zones, LHS 1140 b is unique in being a small, rocky world confirmed to possess an atmosphere.

Dr. David Charbonneau highlighted the significance of finding an Earth-like planet with an atmosphere outside our solar system. While previous studies on exoplanets like K2-18b and TRAPPIST-1 have provided intriguing hints, LHS 1140 b marks a definitive atmospheric detection on a rocky, habitable zone world. Although life hasn't been found yet, this discovery brings humanity considerably closer to that ultimate scientific prize.
chinese_title: 遥远恒星宜居带类地行星首次发现大气层
chinese_summary:
研究人员取得了一项突破性发现：首次在一个遥远恒星的宜居带内，类地岩石行星上探测到大气层。哈佛大学的Collin Cherubim博士称这项发现为“一项重大发现”，它提供了迄今为止最有力的证据，表明太阳系外可能存在类似地球的条件。

这颗行星被命名为LHS 1140 b，距离地球48光年，围绕一颗红矮星运行。尽管探测到的大气气体主要由氦组成，这种气体本身无法维持生命，但科学家推测，在更低的高度可能存在其他更能支持生命的气体。

这项发现是回答“生命是否存在于其他地方”这一根本性问题的关键一步。位于“宜居带”（即与恒星距离适中，足以使液态水存在的区域）的行星被认为是生命存在的首要候选者。尽管已在这些区域发现数百颗行星，但LHS 1140 b的独特之处在于它是一颗被证实拥有大气层的小型岩石世界。

David Charbonneau博士强调了在太阳系外发现一颗拥有大气层的类地行星的重要性。尽管此前对K2-18b和TRAPPIST-1等系外行星的研究提供了引人入胜的线索，但LHS 1140 b标志着首次在宜居带的岩石世界上确定性地探测到大气层。尽管尚未发现生命，但这项发现使人类离实现这一终极科学目标又近了一大步。

title: The state of open source AI
summary:
The "State of Open Source AI V1.0" report, published July 2026, highlights open source AI's critical role in fostering competition, interoperability, and user ownership, echoing Mozilla's past fight for the open web.

The report reveals that open-weight models have largely closed the capability gap with top closed models, achieving parity in areas like coding and general knowledge, though closed models retain a lead in reasoning. Concurrently, GPT-4-class inference costs have plummeted 50x in 36 months, making open models significantly more cost-effective. As a result, open models now route a majority of production tokens on platforms like OpenRouter, driven by cost-conscious developers.

While open models lead in developer adoption (79%), they face significant hurdles in reaching production (only 51% vs. 63% for closed). This "operational gap" stems from a lack of mature tooling, standardization, and enterprise readiness, rather than model capability. The open-source AI stack generally scores high on capability but low on operational maturity.

Financially, open-weight AI is a multi-hundred-billion-dollar commercial market, backed by substantial venture funding and proven revenue models (e.g., hosted inference, enterprise platforms). Companies like DeepSeek and Mistral show rapid growth and high valuations. The metered pricing of closed models is becoming unsustainable at scale, driving users to more economical open alternatives.

Globally, open AI is a "sovereignty choice." The ability to run models on owned hardware provides optionality and freedom from vendor lock-in—a stark lesson learned from instances where providers abruptly cut access. China, through intentional policy, is a dominant source of open-weight models, seeing it as a hedge against tech monopolies and export controls, leading to massive adoption across the globe.

The report concludes by identifying the "agentic harness" as the new frontier, envisioning it as the user agent for AI, much like the browser for the open web.
chinese_title: 开源AI的现状
chinese_summary:
2026年7月发布的《开源AI现状V1.0》报告强调了开源AI在促进竞争、互操作性和用户所有权方面的关键作用，这呼应了Mozilla过去为开放网络而战的经历。

报告显示，开源权重模型已大大缩小与顶级闭源模型的能力差距，在编码和通用知识等领域取得了对等能力，尽管闭源模型在推理方面仍保持领先。与此同时，GPT-4级别的推理成本在36个月内下降了50倍，使得开源模型显著更具成本效益。因此，在注重成本的开发者驱动下，开源模型目前在OpenRouter等平台上承载了大部分生产级令牌。

尽管开源模型在开发者采纳方面处于领先地位（79%），但它们在投入生产方面面临重大障碍（仅51%，而闭源模型为63%）。这种“运营差距”源于缺乏成熟的工具、标准化和企业级就绪性，而非模型能力。开源AI技术栈在能力上得分较高，但在运营成熟度上得分较低。

在财务方面，开源权重AI是一个数千亿美元的商业市场，获得了大量风险投资支持，并拥有经过验证的收入模式（例如，托管推理、企业平台）。DeepSeek和Mistral等公司展现出快速增长和高估值。闭源模型的按量计费模式在规模化应用中正变得不可持续，促使用户转向更经济的开源替代方案。

在全球范围内，开源AI是一种“主权选择”。在自有硬件上运行模型的能力提供了选择性并摆脱了供应商锁定——这是从提供商突然切断访问的案例中吸取的惨痛教训。中国通过有意的政策，成为开源权重模型的主要来源，将其视为对抗技术垄断和出口管制的一种对冲，从而在全球范围内获得了大规模采用。

报告最后指出，“代理束缚”（agentic harness）是新的前沿，将其设想为AI的用户代理，就像开放网络的浏览器一样。

title: Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters
summary:
The provided text is not the full article, but rather a paywall for a Financial Times article. The only substantive information available is from the title: **Apple is reportedly targeting dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters.**

The rest of the content consists of various subscription offers for accessing the Financial Times, including "FT Edit," "Standard Digital," and "Premium Digital" plans, detailing their respective features and pricing structures. The actual details, reasons, and context behind Apple's legal actions against OpenAI employees are locked behind these subscription options.
chinese_title: 苹果向数十名OpenAI员工发出律师函
chinese_summary:
所提供的文本并非全文，而是《金融时报》文章的付费墙。唯一可获取的实质性信息来自标题：**据报道，苹果公司正以律师函针对数十名OpenAI员工。**

其余内容包括《金融时报》的各种订阅优惠，例如“FT Edit”、“Standard Digital”和“Premium Digital”套餐，详细介绍了它们各自的功能和定价结构。苹果公司针对OpenAI员工采取法律行动的实际细节、原因和背景都需通过这些订阅选项才能获取。
